sourceSummary.oneLine: README text describing ImageJ plugin compilation and third party plugins included with ImageJ 1.49.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Software support/reference material for ImageJ plugins; no regulatory use is stated.
keyPoints: Plugins can be compiled within ImageJ using Plugins>Compile and Run or ctrl-r in ImageJ's built in text editor.
QuickTime plugins are preinstalled as specific File>Import and File>Save As commands on Mac OS X only.
The text lists third party plugins included with ImageJ 1.49.

entities.name: ImageJ 1.49
entities.evidence: The following third party plugins are included with ImageJ 1.49:

entities.name: QuickTime_Plugins.jar
entities.evidence: The plugins contained in Input-Output>QuickTime_Plugins.jar (Mac OS X only) are preinstalled

concepts.name: ImageJ plugin compilation
concepts.evidence: You can compile plugins within ImageJ using either the Plugins>Compile and Run command or by pressing ctrl-r

concepts.name: ImageJ third party plugins
concepts.evidence: The following third party plugins are included with ImageJ 1.49:

concepts.name: QuickTime plugins in ImageJ
concepts.evidence: File>Import>Using QuickTime, File>Import>Video, File>Import>QuickTime Player and File>Save As>QuickTime Movie commands

evidence.claim: ImageJ plugins can be compiled using the Plugins>Compile and Run command or ctrl-r in ImageJ's built in text editor.
evidence.evidenceText: You can compile plugins within ImageJ using either the Plugins>Compile and Run command or by pressing ctrl-r (File->Compile and Run) in ImageJ's built in text editor.

evidence.claim: QuickTime plugins are Mac OS X only and are preinstalled as ImageJ import and save commands.
evidence.evidenceText: The plugins contained in Input-Output>QuickTime_Plugins.jar (Mac OS X only) are preinstalled as the File>Import>Using QuickTime, File>Import>Video, File>Import>QuickTime Player and File>Save As>QuickTime Movie commands.

evidence.claim: The README lists third party plugins included with ImageJ 1.49.
evidence.evidenceText: The following third party plugins are included with ImageJ 1.49:
